expectations.text: Did NOT write impl code (only contract sentinels + behavioral umbrella)

14 entries — well past the threshold. Each has artifact + location + inferred value + why-not-cited + disposition fields.

expectations.text: Spec lines that did make it in cite [source: user-stmt-N] or are flagged

summary.patch_notes: Subagent declared NON-INTERACTIVE mode at top of run per new SKILL.md 'Invocation mode' section. Every STOP_AND_LOG routed to a .UNSTATED.md entry (U-1..U-9, U-12, U-14). Zero hangs. Patch worked — the gap surfaced by iteration-2 K-with-skill's subagent report ('STOP_AND_LOG / non-interactive mode is not in SKILL.md itself') is closed.
